subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Tanazu'-i Baqa
subcodes.first_line: O honored society [for the advancement] of humanity! All mankind should be grateful on account of your noble purpose and lofty intentions…. One day I was standing by a creek and observed that a swarm of small locusts
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای انجمن محترم عالم انسانی از این نیت خیریه و علویت مقاصد که دارید باید مورد شکرانیت
subcodes.subjects: @The Holy Spirit, @nationalism; love of country, @unity; oneness of humanity, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @love and unity, @competition vs. cooperation; the struggle for existence
